key_findings: Explicit target submissions can donate unrelated provenance/name aliases as strong identity keys.
Community-board generic keys remain under-specified when borough context is known.
Project program candidate edges remain noisy and should not cluster unrelated projects.
Project status literals such as awarded, in progress, underway, launched, and pending board approval were normalizing to other.
Materializer merge order let an early other companion hide later concrete document_time_status and project_family values.
Relation/treatment family-only classifiers are safe future ontology lanes, but relation-kind alias rewrites should wait.
Stale identity-review artifacts contained 64 program-only project candidate edges.
Broad program labels such as BRT Phase I Program and Better Buses Action Plan are context, not merge authority.
project_family is not currently an identity-review project candidate edge source.
3018 relation records previously had relation_family other.
Organization hierarchy literals had clear family-only mappings and should not rewrite raw relation_kind.
Treatment bus-stop/boarding exact-token mappings are plausible but should be handled as a later slice.
542 treatment records previously had treatment_family other.
Exact stop/station/shelter/pad literals can safely map to bus_stop_or_boarding.
Generic station and station_improvement literals are mixed with rail/accessibility/capital work and should not be mapped broadly.
Current route scope distribution is true_route 290, aggregate_list_context 10, split_candidate 20, data_only_scope 1.
Broad aggregate_list_context or split_candidate page suppression would delete substantial writer regions.
Only data_only_scope should remain non-page-bearing for now.
Canonical record_aliases can retain stale base-route aliases even when fresh route inputs emit a letter-suffixed key.
route_b103e, route_b82e, and route_q20a-shaped aliases should not retain route_b103, route_b82, or route_q20 base keys on the same record.
The regression must cover identityKeysForRecord because identity-review operates on canonical records.
Five exact organization-hierarchy relation literals still had relation_family other.
Old project journals carrying document_time_status other needed deterministic replay promotion when concrete statuses could be derived.
Same-number community-board candidate packet noise remains advisory-only because validation and duplicate gates are clean.
agency_name was acting as a strong identity alias for child units such as Department of Subways and NYPD Transit Bureau.
part_of_agency relation context already preserves the parent agency relationship.
True agency records with matching acronym aliases still need to keep agency_name as an alias surface.
Same-street corridor candidate edges were emitted even when boroughs or limits contradicted.
Multi-street aggregate streets arrays were being treated as single-corridor identity surfaces.
Canonical corridor ID changes should wait; the safe immediate fix is identity-review heuristic suppression.
serves_entity has 13 residual records with project-to-entity and entity-to-entity service/beneficiary semantics.
Existing adjacent exact mappings already classify serves_agency as agency_role.
Broad serves, affects, applies_to, uses, and has_associated_entity buckets remain mixed and should stay unresolved without endpoint or payload predicates.
The serves entity-to-entity description 'undertakes capital projects on behalf of' is a narrow agency-role signal.
Plain on-behalf phrasing, plain capital-project phrasing, and ordinary facility serves language should remain unmapped.
Existing lease/license serves rules intentionally retain precedence as funding_award when contract context is present.
Two residual project-to-entity serves records had physical facility/location evidence: headquarters and parking-facility/customer/station descriptions.
One treatment-component-to-entity serves record had treatment applicability evidence through procured-for-use-by wording.
Remaining broad serves records are still mixed and should stay unresolved without stronger endpoint or payload evidence.
The 34 residual treatment_family other records are composite SBS/BRT/toolkit records, generic draft plans, or records without payload-level evidence for a single family.
Generic repair records lack the payload-level elevator/escalator evidence required by the current narrow repair rule.
Existing negative tests for bus_priority, sbs_features, bus rapid transit improvements, technology, draft plan, and generic repair should remain in force.
Payload descriptions can safely classify project/entity rail-location relations when they prove physical rail infrastructure or property adjacency.
Descriptionless raw-text-only candidates such as Webster Avenue Bridge and SAS Phase 2 connection need a separate deterministic raw-text normalization path before classification.
Broad project/entity affects, applies_to, connects_to, and generic agency-involvement records remain intentionally unresolved.
Explicit route-list arrays on applies_to records safely classify ACE expansion relations as route_scope.
Station accessibility work with raw station plus ADA/elevator/escalator evidence safely classifies selected affects records as location_scope.
Exact vendor-service serves phrases can classify Contact Center as a Service and pharmacy benefit management services as funding_award; broader serves records remain unresolved.
The P3 ADA implemented_at project-to-entity relation has station accessibility evidence and can reuse the existing ADA/elevator/escalator station-work predicate.
The remaining 21 broad-label residual relation records are mixed and should remain unresolved without stronger endpoint or payload evidence.

At that checkpoint, negative guards for Penn Station Access association, project/entity applies_to without route-list evidence, and JusticeONE uses remained in force; the later Hooke slice superseded only the named-system/project-involvement/PTASP subset.
The 34 residual treatment_family other records do not currently contain safe payload-only normalization opportunities.
The three repair records mention elevator/escalator assets only in display names, while payload fields remain generic repair descriptions without vertical-circulation evidence.
Composite SBS/BRT/toolkit/package records bundle multiple treatment families and should not be normalized to a single family.
identity-review entity candidate parsing selected agency_name ahead of entity_name because candidate strings were sorted before selection.
Using agency_name only as a fallback removes exactly two current noisy person/person edges and adds none in simulation.
Agency-only records still need agency_name fallback candidate edges when no own-name identity fields exist.
62 of 76 current candidate edges were already covered by durable do-not-merge overrides.
Suppressing before clustering removes reviewed noise without hiding current validator-backed duplicate issues.
The suppression set should be built once from readIdentityDoNotMergeOverrides and identityPairKey.
All 14 remaining candidate edges had high-confidence deterministic action.
Nine edges were exact same person, company, agency, or project identities suitable for merge aliases.
Five edges were role-acronym, component-vs-bundle, route-variant, or aggregate-route distinctions suitable for do-not-merge overrides.

PTASP applies_to department relations can classify as governance_legal when PTASP and DOB/DOS or Department of Buses/Subways identity signals are present.

Department of Paratransit serving Access-A-Ride can classify narrowly as agency_role when endpoint IDs and evidence prove Paratransit's Access-A-Ride operations.
Remaining broad serves/affects/improves/eligible_for records are intentionally unresolved or endpoint-contaminated.
Station-renewal cleaning initiatives can classify as capital_or_infrastructure only when payload text proves power washing/heavy duty cleaning or station-renewal infrastructure signals.
Branded Re-NEW-vation renovation records can classify as capital_or_infrastructure while generic renovation remains other.
Composite SBS/BRT/toolkit records, sparse repair records, and non-treatment artifacts should remain unresolved.
Opening and station_opening event kinds can classify as launch while preserving launched lifecycle semantics.
Stale event_family other and lifecycle_phase other companions must be promoted during deterministic replay for old journals.

Other exact event literals such as public workshop, installation, board adoption, authorization, and schedule/timetable change were queued for exact-literal slices and later implemented; contract award remains queued, while broad committee/information/presentation/incident/track-work events remain deferred.

Exact normalized public workshop and public design workshop literals are safe public_engagement events.
Generic workshop, public event, employee resource group event, committee agenda, and information/report buckets are mixed and remain deferred.

Local deterministic inspection found 28 exact installation records with installed lifecycle already present.
Schedule/timetable changes are safe only as a family-level implementation mapping; delivery, design phases, planning, policy effective dates, and project_step records remain mixed enough to defer.
